claims.claimText: Keck School lists a Continuing Medical Education program among its education offerings.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: CME targets practicing physicians (post-training), placing it in Tier 3 practice/career.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured residency/fellowship index labels but omitted the CME index entry which signals a post-trainee education resource.
claims.limitations: Index-only label; no CME course list, fees, or eligibility on this page.
claims.visibilityRationale: source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL cannot prove campus-specific availability without campusApplicabilityProof

claims.claimText: Keck School Education menu lists Post-Doctoral Researchers as a category alongside MD, residencies, PhD, and master's programs.
claims.limitations: Listing-only; no eligibility, application, or sponsorship details on this page.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Post-Doctoral Researchers sit after terminal degree completion and align with Tier 3 post-trainee research.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured a single lab's postdoc mention but missed the institution-level Education-menu Post-Doctoral Researchers category.
claims.visibilityRationale: source scope HEALTH_SYSTEM_LEVEL cannot prove campus-specific availability without campusApplicabilityProof
